## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, blog improvements, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality has significantly improved, with less AI-generated tone and better technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Shifting focus to FinTech/Finance vertical; new strategy includes pillar articles and supporting content](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Simplifying blog post design: removing hero images, using logo + title for OG image](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [First significant traffic spike typically occurs around month 3 post-publishing](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Tone is more casual, less AI-generated](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Technical accuracy has greatly improved, reducing editing time](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Carmel noted today's content was "the best ones yet"](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Focusing on FinTech and Finance vertical](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [New structure: pillar articles (longer, broad topics) with supporting articles](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Added manufacturing and employee experience (e.g., onboarding) topics](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Carmel to review and approve new topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Blog Post Design Changes

  - [Removing hero images to streamline process](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [New design: logo + article title for both blog post and OG image](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Carmel's designer to create new blog version template](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Considering future addition of vertical-specific icons](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### CTAs and Structure

  - [Testing new CTA placement: 5 articles with mid-content CTA, 5 with bottom CTA](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Aim: improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Production Status

  - [Placeholders for images to be used temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [6 articles in production, going live ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Refreshed articles to be published immediately](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Using Google Search Console for click and impression data](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Typical growth pattern: impression growth first, clicks compound weeks 2-3](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [First big traffic spike usually occurs around month 3](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Specific Content Requests

  - [Backlinking to new FinTech customer stories once published](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Refresh article: "What is build and run in IT operations" (adapted from revenue operations)](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to review and approve new topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Jess to send image previews for approval before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Carmel's designer to create new blog post template (logo + title)](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Team to implement simplified blog post design](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Publish articles in production and refreshed content ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Include "What is build and run in IT operations" in next batch of refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance via Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Team to provide weekly performance updates in reports](https://fathom.video/share/H4mArxxEaqouFFeasuMaEXq58b5YpfZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
